title: 2010-2022 Lexus RX350 RX450h Rear Shock Absorber Replacement Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to removal and installation procedure.

items.name: Replacement KYB (OEM quality) non-F-Sport rear shock
1/2" drive cordless DeWALT impact wrench kit to take the wheels off
1/2" torque wrench for tightening the wheels
